description: lightweight content manager designed to organize and deliver supported game files

changelog: Added `/mnt/ext1` as a new destination shortcut.
Improved display of `standard` and `backport` metadata in the details screen.
This update focuses on UI refinement, smoother navigation, better queue behavior, and internal stability improvements.
Reworked the main layout with a cleaner top navigation.
Moved Library, Settings, and Queue into dedicated tabs.
Moved search, sorting, and refresh controls to the top bar for better screen usage.
Improved queue behavior and user feedback.
Added local cover caching to reduce repeated image downloads and improve browsing performance.
Added internal fixes for version handling, status labels, and UI consistency.
Removed duplicated library header text from the main content area.
Reorganized the interface into clearer sections:
Grouped entries with the same `titleId` into one library card.
Detail view now shows individual variants for games, formats, DLCs, and backports.
Destination shortcuts were simplified to `/data`, `/mnt`, and `/mnt/usb0`.
Poster rendering now uses full-image fit to avoid cutting logos and cover text.
Catalog items can now use the optional `apremu` field, shown as a red cover badge.
Arabic and Turkish languages ​​added.
Downloads with connection errors can be resumed from where they were interrupted.
